provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Tanzania Court of Appeal (Sub-registries) (Establishment) Order.

There is hereby established a sub-registry of the Tanzania Court of Appeal in each of the places specified in the Schedule to this Order. Schedule (1) Mwanza (2) Arusha (3) Dodoma (4) Mtwara (5) Tabora (6) Mbeya (7) Tanga (8) Songea (9) Moshi (10) Bukoba.
